title: SolarEdge (SEDG) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
text: SolarEdge Q2 2024 Earnings Day Expectations. Overview: As SolarEdge prepared to report Q2 2024 earnings on August 7, analyst expectations were positioned for disappointing results. Consensus Estimates: Wall Street consensus expected revenue of approximately 258 million, down 74% year-over-year from Q2 2023. EPS expectations were for a loss of 1.56 per share. Earnings Surprise Potential: Some analysts suggested a modest positive Earnings Surprise Potential (ESP), though overall expectations were for challenging results. Market Context: The photovoltaic manufacturer had missed estimates in the prior quarter and faced ongoing headwinds from weak demand and European market challenges. Forward Guidance: Investors awaited management commentary on the company's path to stabilization, potential turnaround timeline, and confidence in reaching profitability.
